intentSynonyms: search for users by name or email in jira
search for jira users by name or email in jira
description: Search for Jira users by name or email. Useful for finding account IDs to use with assign_issue or create_issue.

query.description: Search string to match against user display names and emails. Leave empty to list all users.

max_results.description: Maximum number of users to return (default 20, max 50)

start_at.description: Index of the first user to return for pagination
